Title: Kallab, Wolfgang
Overview: Vasari scholar of Vienna school. He was born in Prostejov, Czechoslovakia, which is present-day Prostějov, Czech Republic.
Sources: KRG, 32; Metzler Kunsthistoriker Lexikon: zweihundert Porträts deutschsprachiger Autoren aus vier Jahrhunderten. Stuttgart: Metzler, 1999, pp. 203-4.
